case_title: WONG, KENNETH vs. WOODS, JOHN et al

docket_entries.description: STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF OCT-20-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON OCT-20-1995, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), ALSO: SET FOR COURT'S OWN MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE CASES 119797 & 119798. ANY OPPOSITION PAPERS ARE TO BE FILED NO LATER THAN 11/15/95. PLAINTIFF TO GIVE DEFT. NOTICE OF NEW DATE. HEARING SET FOR NOV-20-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WONG, KENNETH AS TO DEFENDANT WOODS, JOHN MONG, CAMELA DOES 1 TO 15 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          OCT-20-1995 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-21-1995 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       OCT-02-1995
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
